title.title: 'chi ba med pa'i mdzod kyi rgya cher 'grel pa 'dod 'jo'i ba mo

msContents.summary: This translation of the Kavikāmadhenu was printed as part of the collected works of si tu pan chen. This print is preserved at the National Library of Mongolia.

msItem.title: 'chi ba med pa'i mdzod kyi rgya cher 'grel pa 'dod 'jo'i ba mo

body.p:
de nastataḥ gzhan la phan paparahita rjes su ston paanuśāsanas sdig pa zhi ba dang bsod nams phun sum tshogs pa bsgrub pa'i phyir/pāpaśāntapuṇyasampatsaṃhārāt kun du bzang posamantabhadra bcom ldan 'dasbhagavān la mchod papūjār brjod pa ni/ gang giyasya zhes
pa la sogs paity ādi ste/ yul gyi dngos po mtha' dagsamastavastuviṣaya yongs su mkhyen paparijñāna ni mkhyen pajñāna'o/ sdug bsngalduḥkha las yang dag par 'don pasamuddharaṇar bzhed pakāma ni brtse badayā'o/ de dag gistaiḥ rgya mtshosindhu dang 'dra basiva rgya mtshosindhu ste/ mkhyen pa dang brtse ba'i rgya
mtshojñānadayāsindhu de nieva sangs rgyasbuddha bcom ldan 'dasbhagavān so/ /'diriha rgya mtsho'i sgrasindhuśabda 'di niatra gting med pa la sogs pa'i yon tanagādhādiguṇa mtshungs pa'i phyirsamānāt btags pagauṇaḥ'o/ de'itena gting med pa nyid la sogs paagādhatvādi'ang mkhyen pa dang brtse bas byas pajñānadayākṛta'o zhes paitir byed pa
cankartṛ la mang pobahular ro zhes paiti'i bsdu basamāsa'o/ bya bakṛtya ni ma 'ongs paanāgata'i don nyid kyi phyirarthatvāt dgos pa medaprayojana do/ mkhyen pa dang brtse ba dag gis rgya mtshojñānadayāsindhu zhes brjod paity uktas na des byatatkṛtas so zhes shes par byaiti prajñāyate ste de latatra ltos paapekṣā'i tshig dang 'brel papadasambandhas yang napunar drug pa'iṣaṣṭhī bsdu basamāsa'o/ mkhyen pa dang brtse ba dag gis rgya mtshojñānadayāsindhu lta
bu ste 'og gzhiādhāra'i rgya mtsho chen pomahāsamudra'o/ /gting med paagādha ni gzhananya gyis mi rtogs paanadhigata ste mkhyen brtsejñānadayā pha mtha' yas pa'i phyirpāratvāt zabgambhīra cing yongs su gcad du med paaparicchedya'o/ bcom ldan 'dasbhagavān kyi mkhen pajñānas shes byajñeya'i dkyil 'khor thams cadsamastaviṣaya la khyabvyāpti cing brtse badayās kyang sdug bsngalduḥkha gyi rgya mtshosāgarar bying banimagna'i 'gro bagāmin
skyabs med panistrāṇa mtha' yas paananta la mngon par khyababhivyāpta cing rgyas pa'i phyirvṛddhyartham su zhig giskenacit detat'i mthar thug paparyantar bgrod pagamanar nusśakta zhes dgongs paity abhiprāya'o/ /de ltar gyur pa gangkathambhūta sdig medanagha de 'dod chags la sogs pa'i nyes pa spangs parāgādidoṣarahita'o/ yon tanguṇa ni byams pa dang bzod pa dang nye bar zhi ba la sogs pamaitrīkṣamopaśamādi ste/ gu ṇa
bod pa laguṇa āmantraṇe'o/ /zhes paiti ata mtha' canadanta gyi byingsdhātu tsurcur sogsādi kyi ltag maśeṣa ste/ detat ni tshogsgaṇa yongs su ma rdzogs pa laaparisamāpta brita byed pa'i phyirvṛta karaṇāt ro/ /legs pa don du gnyer ba rnams kyisśreyārthibhiḥ 'bod paāmantraṇa ste goms par byed pa'i phyirabhyāsatvāt i las atsa_er ac'o/ kyaibho blo ldanbuddhimān khyed cag rnams kyisbhavadbhiḥ detam bsten par byos
shig cessevyatām iti rtogs par bya'o/

lg.l: mi phan paahitar yangapi phanhita gyur gang deyaḥ saḥ mkhas papaṇḍita ste/
/mkhas papaṇḍita gang zhigyaḥ mi phan paahita la bzodsahate bcas minna/
/khyad parviśeṣataḥ de sladtasmāt don gyi mchogparamārtha ni bsgrub papratipatti'i phyir/
/brtsekṛpā dang blo grosprajñā pha rol phyinpāramitā nyid 'tshol bar byedanveṣate/

body.p:
/mchog gi snying rje la sogs paparamakāruṇikādi yon tanguṇa rgya che
ba nyid kyi phyirvipulatvāt gzhan gyi phanparahita bdesukha yang dag par sgrub pasamudāgama la ngalśrama zhing gtugs pa med paaparyādattas na mi zad paakṣaya'o/ /yang naathavā 'khor basamsāra las legs par brgal basamtīrṇa nyid kyis rga ba dang 'chi ba med pa'i phyirajarāmaratvāt mi zad paakṣaya ste bri ba med paahīna'o/

/rgya mtshosindhu'i gting med paagādha ni mthil la mi reg pa nyidatalasparśatva dang/ skyon med paanagha'i
༅༅། /yon tanguṇa ni rin po che'i byung gnasratnākara la sogs paādi dang / mi zad paakṣaya ni yongs su gang ba nyidparipūrṇatva do/ skye bo'i gtam mtha' dagsakalajanapravṛtti ni 'bras buphala la gzhol ba yin papravaṇas gtampravṛtti gyi 'bras buphala nye bar ston paupadarśa ni dpal dang bdud rtsi'i ched duśriye cāmṛtāya ca'ang zhes paiti ste 'tshed pa'i phyir du 'gro ba lta bu depākāya vrajati iva tat'i don
nyid la bzhi patādarthya caturthī'o/ /dang dangca ca yang gi don canarthin tsa yigca śabda dag ni phan tshun kun sdud pasamāhāretaretara'o/ /rgya mtshosindhu ni brtandṛḍha zhing yangs pavipula'o zhesiti lhadeva rnams la rab tu gragsprasiddha so/ /detat'i dpalśrī ni dpal molakṣmī dang 'chi medamṛta ni bdud rtsisudhā ste de'i ched du bsten patadartha sevyatām'o/ /mkhyen pa dang brtse ba'i rgya mtshojñānadayāsindhu ni srid pasamsāra'i bde ba 'dod pasukhaiṣin'i
mkhas papaṇḍita rnams kyis dpalśrī te sde tshan gsumtrivarga gyi phun sum tshogs pasampatti'i phyir dang thar pa 'dod pa rnams gyis 'chi medmumukṣubhiḥ amṛta de thar pa'i chedmokṣārthaṃ du bsten pasevyar gyis shig ces paiti'o/

/'diriha mkhyen pa dang brtse ba'i rgya mtshojñānadayāsindhu la sogs pa rnams kyisādibhiḥ thams cad mkhyen pasarvajña sems can thams cadsarvasattva la rgyu med paniṣkaraṇar mchog tuparama
mnyen gshin pa'i rang bzhin canvātsalyasvabhāva bcom ldan 'dasbhagavān bde bar gshegs pasugata de nyidsa eva gsalsphuṭa zhing nye bar mtshon paupalakṣitas na 'di ni rab dngas zhes paprasāda snyankāvya dag gi yon tanguṇa no/ /de skad du/tad uktam dbyangs can gyi mgul rgyan zhes bya ba'i snyan ngag gi rgyansarasvatīkaṇṭhābharaṇakāvyālaṅkāra las/ gang gi donyad artha ni rab gsal baprākaṭya/ /desaḥ ni rab tu dang baprasādar brjod/abhidhīyate /
dper na/tad yathā

lg.l: 'diayam shar gyur pasudayati pa d+ma canpadmin dang shar riudayagiri'i nags tshalvana gyi/
/ma n+dā ramandāra yi me tog gzhon nupuṣpa bāla'i phreng bamālā rgya grolmudrābhañjana zhing/
/'gal baviraha rnams bralvidhura ngur pakoka gnyis gnyisdvandva gnyenbandhu gyur khros pakupita yi/
/spre'ukapi 'i 'gram pakapola khros pakrodhas dmar batāmra smagtamas las rnam par 'byed/vibhinatti

body.p:
'diriha mun pa dang bral batamo vigatas ngur pakoka'i
mya ngan bsal ba la sogs paśokaharaṇādis ma brjod kyang nyi maanukto 'pi sūrya'i mtshan nyidlakṣaṇa kyi donartha gsal barprakaṭam mtshon paupalakṣyate'o zhesiti so/ ༈

/tshigs su bcad pa 'diśloko 'yam bstan bcos la'ang sbyarśāstre 'pi viniyujyate te de latatra smra ba po snyan ngag mkhanvaktṛkavi la sogs paādi la'am/ yang napunar rig pa'i gnas mtha' dagsamastavidyāsthāna la shes pa'i sbyin pajñānadāna sbyindadāti te de'i itasya i zhes paiti ni
dpallakṣmī te phun sum tshogs pasampatti'o/ /shes pa'i sbyin pajñānadāna phun sum tshogs pasampatti rgyur gyur pahetubhūta destena rgya mtshosindhu dang mtshungs paivas bstan bcosśāstra ni rgya mtshosindhu ste 'ditena ni rgyu'i gzugs canheturūpaka gyi rgyanalaṅkāra no/ /dper na/tad yathā zab pagāmbhīryas rgya mtsho zhes pa lta busamudra iti iva'o/ /de'itasya gting med pa nyidagādhatva ni ji ltar bshad payathokta'i yon tan dang ldan paguṇavat des
mtshungs pa med pa nyidatulyatva do/ /sdug bsngal dang sdig pa dang phongs pa rnams laduḥkhainovyasaneṣv a ghaṃ zhesaghaṃ iti mngon par brjod paabhidhānas skyon med pa'i yon tannirmalaguṇa ni bde ba'i rgyursukhahetu gzhunggrantha nyung ba nyid dang gsal ba la sogs palaghutvavispaṣṭādi'o/ /bsten pasevā ni nyan pa dang bsam pa dang 'chad pa la sogs paśravaṇacintāvyākhyānādi'o/ /mi zad paakṣaya ni yang dag par rdzogs pa nyidsaṃpūrṇatva
de ming gi sgra thams cadsarvanāmaśabda gyis gnas skabsprakrānta kyi'am rab tu gsal bar bya baprakāśana'i rtags kun tusarvaliṅga len par byedādīyate do/ /'di ltartathā hi laskarma gangyat yin pa desaḥ yang dag par rab tu sbyin pasampradānar dgongs paabhipraiti ste/ aṇaṇ dag gal tecet las yin pa gang deyat saḥ byed pa pokartā'o/ de 'dirtad atra 'dod pa na spyod pa'i phyirkāmācavarāt dang/ thos pa'i phyirśrutāt yangpunaḥ
gnas skabs nyidprakrāntatva kyi rgya mtsho'i sgrasindhuśabda'i rtagsliṅga kyis de zhessaḥ iti nges par bstan panirdeśa ste ming dang rtags rjes su bstan panāmaliṅgānuśāsana'i sgraśabda ni ma yinnāsti no/ /dpalśrī ni sde tshan gsum gyi phun sum tshogs patrivargasampatti ste/ ji skad du/yathoktam slob dpon byā ḍiācāryavyāḍis/

lg.l: dpal mo dbyangs can blolakṣmīsarasvatīdhī dang sde gsumtrivarga gyi/
/phun sum tshogssampad dang 'byor bavibhuti mdzes paśobhā dang/

l.ruby:
/
'tshogs chas 'jigs med tshal dang 'phags pa dang /upakaraṇābhīvanārya

lg.l: bdud rtsi rnams lasudhāsu dpal zhesśrīr iti rab tu gragsprathita/

body.p:
/zhesiti so/ /yang na/athavā gangyā zhig ngag gi rang bzhinvāṅmaya thams cad shes pa'i mtshan nyidsarvajñalakṣaṇatva ni rang don phun sum tshogs pasvārthasampat dang/ gangyā zhig de'i rgyu cantaddhetuka sde tshan gsumtrivargahetu gyi rgyu ni gzhan gyi don phun sum tshogs
paparārthasampat ste de gnyistad ubhaya ni dpalśrī la'o/ /rang dang gzhan gyi don phun sumsvaparārthasampat tshegs pasambhāra dang bsod nams dang ye shes gyi tshogspuṇyajñānasambhāra la 'bad payatnas thar pa thob pamokṣa prāpta ni bdud rtsiamṛta'o/ /zhesiti so/ ༈
